{{Form|formName=Dragon|image1=Dragon Form I.png|caption-image1=The Dragon Form incinerates enemies with magical flames. The intense heat crystalizes the remains of your enemies into treasures for you to collect.}}

==Dragon Sequences==
These are acquired from four different specific sources and are required to upgrade Dragon to T4.
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" cellpadding="10"
!Trait
!Source
!Boosts
!Rewards
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ice Breath}}
| Reach Floor 300 in the [[Fissure]]
|In Dragon Form, Snail HP +5%<br>Explore in Dragon Form, gain +2% Dragon Chests<br>Free Research Speedup (Dragon) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest, +50|orange}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Flame Breath}}
| Reach Floor 400 in the [[Fissure]]
|In Dragon Form, Snail ATK +5%<br>Explore in Dragon Form, gain +2% Dragon Chests<br>Free Research Speedup (Dragon) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest, +50|orange}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Emerald Breath}}
| Reach Floor 500 in the [[Fissure]]
|In Dragon Form, Snail DEF +5%<br>Explore in Dragon Form, gain +2% Dragon Chests<br>Free Research Speedup (Dragon) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest, +50|orange}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Holy Breath}}
| Reach Floor 600 in the [[Fissure]]
|In Dragon Form, Snail RUSH +5%<br>Explore in Dragon Form, gain +2% Dragon Chests<br>Free Research Speedup (Dragon) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest, +50|orange}}
|}

==Tiers and Stats==

===Base Stats===
Below is each Tier and their base stats in Dragon Form. The stat bonus provided by obtaining form sequences is not included until Tier 4 as it requires all four sequences to be activated. 
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" cellpadding="10"
!Tier
!Form
!HP
!ATK
!DEF
!RUSH
!Bonuses
|-
|I
|Snailgon
| +20%
| +20%
| +20%
| +20%
|
|-
|II
|Roamer
| +25%
| +25%
| +25%
| +25%
|
|-
|III
|Element Master
| +30%
| +30%
| +30%
| +30%
|
|-
|IV
|Breath of Chaos
| +40%
| +40%
| +40%
| +40%
|
|-
|V
|Fairy Dragon
| +45%
| +45%
| +45%
| +45%
|Explore in Dragon Form, gain +38% Dragon Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Dragon) +20m
|-
|VI
|Dimensional Dragon
| +50%
| +50%
| +50%
| +50%
|
|-
|VII
|Void Dragon
| +55%
| +55%
| +55%
| +55%
|Explore in Dragon Form, gain +48% Dragon Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Dragon) +20m
|}
===Extra Boosts===
After T4, orange [[relics]] can be awakened for extra boosts.
{| class="wikitable"
!Relics Awakened
!Boosts
|-
|1
|In All Forms, All ELMT DMG +3
|-
|10
|All ELMT DMG +30
|-
|20
|
|}

==Rank Up Rituals==
Once research is complete, a ritual will be started. Once the conditions are cleared, Dragon Form will rise from in Tier.

<tabber>
|-|T4=
For Dragon Form to rise from T3 to T4:
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to complete
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithLink|Ice Breath|black|Dragon Form#Dragon Sequences}}
|Reach Floor 300 in the [[Fissure]]
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithLink|Flame Breath|black|Dragon Form#Dragon Sequences}}
|Reach Floor 400 in the [[Fissure]]
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithLink|Emerald Breath|black|Dragon Form#Dragon Sequences}}
|Reach Floor 500 in the [[Fissure]]
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithLink|Holy Breath|black|Dragon Form#Dragon Sequences}}
|Reach Floor 600 in the [[Fissure]]
|-
|Obtain {{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Serum}} from Super Gene Expert
|Speak with the [[Mailbox#Super Gene Expert|Super Gene Expert]] from the [[Mailbox]]
|-
|Ascend when all forms reach T4
|Superfluous as Dragon Form requires all T5 forms to unlock.
|}
|-|T5=
For Dragon Form to rise from T4 to T5:
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to complete
|-
|Summon [[Altar#Discount Dragon|Divine Dragon]] and wish for Dragon Power<br>to get {{RewardIconWithText|Fairy Dragon Power}}
|Claiming any {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb|orange}} when on this step will guarantee the wish appears. It should be the only option. 
|-
|Reach Dragon Form Trial Lv. 100
|Unlocked after reaching Floor 800 in the [[Gene Simulation|General Gene Simulation]] and purchasing the value pack for 8k W-Tads.
|-
|Ascend when all forms reach T5
|Superfluous as Dragon Form requires all T5 forms to unlock.
|}
|-|T6=
For Dragon Form to rise from T5 to T6:
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to complete
|-
|Summon [[Altar#Discount Dragon|Divine Dragon]] and wish for Dragon Power
|Claiming any {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb|orange}} when on this step will guarantee the wish appears. It should be the only option. 
|-
|Reach Dragon Form Trial Lv. 200
|
|-
|Ascend when all forms reach T6
|'''DO NOT RUSH DRAGON T6.''' As it requires all other forms to be T6, doing T6 dragon research early will exhaust your saved cells and drastically slow down your other research.
|}
|-|T7=
For Dragon Form to rise from T6 to T7:<br>
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual !!How to Complete
|-
|Summon [[Altar#Discount Dragon|Divine Dragon]] and wish for Dragon Power
|Claiming any {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb|orange}} when on this step will guarantee the wish appears. It should be the only option. 
|-
|Reach Dragon Form Trial Lv. 300
|
|-
|Ascend when all forms reach T7
|Same advice as T6, don't rush dragon form tiers.
|}
</tabber>
